comments_clusters.representative_excerpt: I support the EPA rule but urge the EPA to take stronger action on performance testing. The EPA should require facilities to do performance testing more frequently to ensure all mitigation measures are working properly. The EPA is proposing that facilities test every 60 months and conduct a RATA test annually. The annual RATA test is not the same or as effec...
